name: Guangzhou Development Group Incorporated
summary: Guangzhou Development Group Incorporated engages in the integrated energy business in China. The company generates and sells thermal electricity with an installed capacity of 4,045,800 kilowatts; distributes natural gas through pipeline network; supplies coal; and constructs oil depots. It also generates electricity using wind, waste, biomass, and solar resources, as well as engages in other renewable energy business. Guangzhou Development Group Incorporated was founded in 1997 and is based in Guangzhou, China.
